articles.title: Algorand Climbs 30% During Market Downturn
articles.description: Algorand's cryptocurrency surged by 30% despite a broader market downturn, highlighting its resilience and growing interest among investors amid overall volatility in the digital currency market.

articles.title: El Salvador says merchants must process BTC transactions — Or they may face action
articles.description: A Salvadoran government official has said that while businesses must accept BTC transactions, they can choose whether to receive BTC or USD upon settling transactions.
